name: @mockflow/mockflow-bridge
description: Connects your own AI agent (Claude Code or Codex) to a live MockFlow board open in the browser. The agent is the brain, the browser tab is the hands, the bridge is the nervous system between them.

scripts.check: node --check bin/mockflow-bridge.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/log.js && node --check src/debug.js && node --check src/ui.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/agentPicker.js && node --check src/catalog.js && node --check src/boardHub.js && node --check src/mcpEndpoint.js && node --check src/agents/index.js && node --check src/agents/spawnPortable.js && node --check src/agents/claude.js && node --check src/agents/codex.js && node --check src/agents/opencode.js && node --check src/agents/health.js && node --check src/updateCheck.js && node --check src/dashboard.js && node --check src/generationCap.js && node --check src/bridgeai/index.js && node --check src/bridgeai/providers/index.js && node --check src/bridgeai/providers/openrouter.js && node --check src/bridgeai/providers/azure.js && node --check src/bridgeai/providers/bedrock.js && node --check src/bridgeai/models.js && node --check src/bridgeai/client.js && node --check src/bridgeai/mcp.js && node --check src/bridgeai/tools.js && node --check src/bridgeai/attachments.js && node --check src/bridgeai/session.js && node --check src/bridgeai/run.js && node --check src/bridgeai/cli.js && node --check src/agentManager.js && node --check src/daemon.js && node --check src/stdioProxy.js && node --check browser/mockflow-bridge-client.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run canary

author: A Produle Systems Pvt Ltd
